title: Grilled Roast Beef with Roasted Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful recipe for roast beef and vegetables, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the roast beef with salt and pepper.
Grill the roast beef for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
While the roast beef is cooking, toss the vegetables with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the vegetables for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly charred.
Let the roast beef rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving with the roasted vegetables.
